data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fraud detection, specifically regarding self-referrals and fake accounts. While the evidence indicates that the fraud system flags suspicious self-referral patterns and blocks them, it does not provide comprehensive details on how these detections are made or the effectiveness of the fraud detection mechanisms. This lack of clarity indicates a gap in the requirement for robust fraud detection as specified in the use case.
gaps: Insufficient details on the fraud detection mechanisms and their effectiveness.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
